content.en:
Thirteenth floor!

Fourteenth floor!

Fifteenth floor!

Ye Tian passed more and more levels in the Ultimate Tower, and gradually came to a higher level, and other Immortal Ultimate Realm Masters were also left behind by him.

After an endless long time.

Ye Tian finally came to the twenty-first layer.

At this time, his strength has improved a lot compared to the past, not only is the ultimate will stronger, but the ultimate body of ten thousand laws is also much stronger, and the ultimate way of ten thousand laws has gradually reached another level under his continuous improvement.

From the twenty-first level onwards, there is an assessment of the ultimate way to create oneself.

Each layer here is guiding an Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Lord to create the ultimate path by himself, and Ye Tian has already created the ultimate path by himself, so it is very simple to pass these assessments~.

But he didn't rush through it, but he was constantly using these opportunities to perfect his ultimate path of ten thousand laws.

For example, in a ball of light on the twenty-first floor, Lin Tian sensed the changes of thousands of Ultimate Dao particles, and the changes in these Ultimate Dao particles helped an Eternal Ultimate Realm Master to create the Ultimate Dao by himself and comprehend the essence and essence of the Ultimate Dao.

Similarly, the changes in these Ultimate Dao particles were also of great help to Ye Tian, helping him to go one step further in his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao.

"The self-created ultimate path truly has an infinite future, and the ultimate path that already exists in heaven and earth has never been able to transcend the existing source. "

"For example, the Ultimate Dao of the Abyssal Star, cultivated to the extreme, is still only comparable to the Abyssal Star Subject, and in the eyes of the powerful Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord, the Abyssal Star Subject is just a toy, no matter how much you cultivate, you can't make the Abyssal Star Main Body burst out with too amazing power. "

"In the same way, what is the ultimate way of the Polar Day, the ultimate way of the Demon Hell, it is still impossible to surpass the Land of the Polar Day, the ultimate Demon Hell, and in the eyes of the Ultimate Extreme Venerables, these places are still ant-like things. "

"And only the ultimate way of self-creation can truly have an infinite future, unlimited potential and remodeling!"

For example, Ye Tian created the ultimate way of ten thousand laws, even now, he can still improve it and continue to improve the ultimate way of ten thousand laws, there is no limit at all.

Originally, Ye Tian had already felt that the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao he had created was already perfect, but now that he saw this ball of light containing thousands of Ultimate Dao particles, he truly realized that the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao he had created was not strong enough.

If he divided the ultimate path of his own creation, his current ultimate path of ten thousand laws would be inferior at most.

But if you think about it carefully, why should the ultimate path of ten thousand laws that he spent so much time create compare to the ultimate path created by those ultimate supreme masters for countless eras?

Of course, he can slowly improve, and even if he reaches the ultimate supreme realm, he can continue to improve his ultimate path of ten thousand laws.

So, he's not in a hurry.

Countless years of the ultimate epoch have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian left from the twenty-first floor and headed to the twenty-second floor.

In the ultimate void assessment leading to the twenty-second layer, he saw an unimaginably vast void, it seemed that no matter how he flew, he could not shuttle through, and any power was disintegrated here.

Suddenly, he understood that if he wanted to travel through the past, he had to create his own ultimate way, and use his ultimate way to build a bridge and travel from here.

"The ultimate way of ten thousand laws, go!"

His Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao condensed a path that ran through the Ultimate Void, and no matter how special this Ultimate Void was, it couldn't disintegrate his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao.

His ultimate path of ten thousand laws had reached the twenty-second level.

Wow!

He easily went from the twenty-first floor to the twenty-second floor.

Upon entering the twenty-second floor, he saw a statue.

This statue seems to be very ordinary, but in fact it is a condensation of the Ultimate Dao, and it is also created by an Ultimate Supreme Deity based on his own Ultimate Supreme Body.

Attaining such a statue will help you to perfect your ultimate path and perfect your ultimate body, which is still very helpful.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian sat in front of the statue, silently contemplating, trying to sort out all his ultimate ways and ultimate bodies, so as to make himself stronger!

And just like that, a long time passed.

this day.

The aura on Ye Tian's body was a little stronger, and he obviously had gained something again.

After that, he continued from the twenty-second floor to the twenty-third, twenty-fourth, and twenty-fifth floors, and the difficulty of these levels was very simple for him, and it couldn't hinder him at all.

He went all the way, like a bamboo, and before he knew it, he came to the twenty-ninth floor.

At his current rate, it won't be too long to get out of the Ultimate Tower.

And besides him, the other Immortal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters, the one with the highest progress at the moment had only reached the fifteenth layer, and compared to Ye Tian, the gap was too big.

Now, those Ultimate Extreme Masters didn't bother to pay attention to the matter of the Ultimate Tower, because they all knew that other Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters couldn't compare to Lin Tian.

In other words, they all lost to Doomsday Extreme, where do they still have the heart to pay attention to the situation of the Ultimate Tower!.
